S, Ay - Y. frin @ e A v @ w se-Hme %, @ o T A g w0 wwd fe frofafen e S W g A - (i) fabmi @ v i Fraf sidw e, (i) verd 39 3w @ fofie Wl @ orgey e 5w Pt e s & (i) 3 fafem dfpn wer BT d B, ot (iv) e o g shwoy aifera g o fa @ fer @ @ R st A A frfa ® [, T, 7, 15017/30/2004-F T} I, %, v, e W fiwvfi:—aafim_m%mfir{mmm4(a),mfiu19m,19ssmmfimfiqwfiafizw Wi o sifem e TP 464(an) , Tt 7 smr, 2006 T g T 3275 G12006 - ) i~ -- 1 of 2 -- : - THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAQRDINARY _[Pamrll Suc30)] MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 16th October, 2006 G.8.R. 640(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sections 6 and 25 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 {29 of 1986), the Central Government herchy makes the following rules further to amend the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, namely :— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Environment (Protection) Second Amendment Rules, 2006. (2) They shall come into foree an the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Inthe Environment (Proteetion) Rules, 1986, in Schedule-1, (i) Inserial number 87 relating (o the “Emission Regulation for Rayon Industry,” for sub-paragraph c, the following sub-paragraph shall be substituted, namely - “c. For new plants/expansion projects being commissioned on or after 1-6-1999 For new plants or expansion projects, the emission standards for existing plants covered in {a) above shall apply subject to compliance of the ambient air quality norms for €S, and H,S indicated in (b) above. The new plants or cxpansion projects shall provide adequate space for undertaking retrofittings. {Note: a and b above also apply to new plants or expansion projects).”; (i) In serial number 89 rejating to “Noise standards for fire crackers”, after sub-paragraph C, the following sub-paragraph shall be inserted, namely -— . “D. The fire crackers for the purpose of export shall be exempted from the sub-paragraphs A, B and C above, subject to the compliance of the following conditions, namely :— @) the manufacturer shall have ap export order; (if) the fire crackers shall conform ta the level prescribed in the country to which it is exported; (iii) they shall have a different packing colour code, and (iv) there shall be a declaration on the box “not for sale in India” or “only for export in other countries.” [F. No. Q. 15017/30/2004-CPW] R. K. VAISH, Jt, Secy. Note :— The principal rules were published in the Gazelte of India vide number S.0. 844(E), 19th November, 1986 and subscquently amended and lastly amended vide G.S.R. 464(E), dated 7th August, 2006.
